services.name: chain
services.label: 0G Chain
services.summary: Galileo contracts are configured for lineup, escrow, and result commitments.

services.name: storage
services.label: 0G Storage
services.summary: Receipt payload is local and deterministic; live 0G Storage proof is shown in the artifact matrix.

services.summary: This result is deterministic background or local fallback output, not a live 0G Compute adjudication.

services.name: da

services.summary: Match and tournament receipts are shaped into a byte-ready blob; live DA submission status is shown in the artifact matrix.

services.name: agentic-id

services.summary: Room includes AI-agent participants ready to map to ERC-7857 metadata.

value.reason: Direct 0G Compute providers are discoverable, but wallet balance is below the 3 0G ledger minimum for broker funding. Top up 0x3D325E51934AE5c7EBf9f37a8Ddf772F48F766Fb with at least 2.969183 0G, then rerun with OG_COMPUTE_BROKER_AUTOFUND=1 to create the broker ledger.

tunnel.role: Optional public bridge for local app/DA sidecar demos. 0G Chain, 0G Storage, and 0G DA artifacts remain the source of truth.

costModel.tunnel: Cloudflare Tunnel is suitable for lightweight demo ingress; Workers/Durable Object usage is billed separately.
